title: Tyler Wright’s Resume
text:
Computer Science Student | Machine Learning Focus

tylerwright200012@gmail.com | (916) 247-1251 | LinkedIn




Computer Science senior at BYU-Idaho with a strong foundation in object-oriented programming and machine learning. Experienced in Python, JavaScript, Rust, and C#, with a focus on building efficient and practical solutions. Quick learner with strong problem-solving skills and collaborative project experience.




2023 – Present
Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, ID
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
2018 – 2022
Los Medanos College, Pittsburg, CA
Associate of Science in Electrical Technology (ETEC)







Collaborated with a team of 7 to develop a classroom tool for random student selection

Implemented backend logic using JavaScript

Designed and styled the interface using Sass





Built a fully functional Tetris game in Rust without prior experience

Applied object-oriented design principles with modular components

Developed over 500 lines of clean, maintainable code






Languages: Python, JavaScript, C++, Java, Rust, Erlang, C#
Tools: VS Code, IntelliJ IDEA, Git




Pittsburg, CA
Deli Employee, TOGO’s
- Worked collaboratively with a team in a fast-paced environment
- Managed customer orders, restocking, and daily operations efficiently




2020 – 2022
Missionary, The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, Las Vegas, NV
- Studied and communicated in Japanese daily
- Conducted planning sessions and submitted weekly reports
- Developed strong communication, discipline, and leadership skills
